get.summary: Get a list of featured photos.

current_user_collections.description: Note: API has a bug whereby this is sometimes set to an empty array. See https://github.com/unsplash/unsplash-api/issues/6869

name.description: An amalgamation of the make and model
Full string representation of the location, including `city` and `country` if they exist.
Full string representation of the location, including `city` and `country` if they exist.

Asset.ImgixUrl.description: Imgix URL with full support for the Imgix API.

last_collected_at.description: This is different from `updated_at` because that may also change when a photo inside changes or is deleted. It can be `null` when we create the collection without any photos in it which happens when we create a collection. We first create the collection which returns `null` then we add a photo to it.

cover_photo.description: This may be null if the topic has no photos.

Topic.Visibility.description:
- Featured: Displayed on nav and topics page
- Visible: Only displayed on topics page
- Hidden: Not displayed on nav or topics page, accessible via direct link
- Removed: Not displayed on nav or topics page, not accessible via direct link. This is only used for notifications where we still want to keep the notification even after the topic has been removed/deleted.

profile_image.description: Users without profiles will return valid placeholder images.

Auth.name: Authorization
Auth.description: Value should be in the format 'Client-ID your-client-id' or 'Bearer your-bearer-token'
